title: Q1 – Airline Real-Time Monitoring
description: Monitoraggio in tempo reale di AA, DL, UA, WN – finestre tumbling 1h

targets.query:
from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q1_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "num_flights")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["airline"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q1_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "dep_delay_mean")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["airline"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q1_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cancellation_rate")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["airline"], valueColumn: "_value")

panels.title: Tasso di partenze in ritardo (>15 min) %

targets.query:
from(bucket: "flights")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "q1_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "late_departure_rate")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["airline"], valueColumn: "_value")
